research_gate: C4 local proof passes and GitHub-hosted run 29671881585 at source 8651038 is strictly imported with replayable attestation digest 75d27618. The first registered gate exposed and closed C3 register retention drift; the second passed that repair and exposed three predecessor verifiers that omitted only the new exact c4-independent-platform-gate substage. Their existing batch, item, authority, dependency, state and receipt checks remain unchanged, focused successor hostiles pass, and one complete registered rerun remains required.
authority_lane: Owner-authorized broad C4 hierarchy/history reconciliation and capability-free closure proof only. Exact dependencies C2 and C3A. No C3B, C5, C6, C7, broad G1 closure, runtime, storage engine, filesystem, network, multiplayer, cross-target transactions, Companion, Greenfield, visual assets or Kernel mutation.
context_health: C4 remains candidate_verified_local. GitHub-hosted run 29671881585 independently executed and attested clean source 8651038; strict import and retained cryptographic replay verify canonical receipt digest 75d27618497c5432c10f86fd2dd25759185238cd3bbf264a583b3743b228542b. Two registered attempts replayed C4 successfully and exposed independent historical integration drift: compressed C3 closure anchors, then omitted independent-platform successor routing in GP3, GP4 and vertical-closeout verifiers. Both repairs are narrow, their focused current and hostile checks pass, and only one complete registered full-gate rerun remains open. C5 stays inactive.

macro_findings: The owner retained the canonical broad route C4 then C5 then C6 then C7 then G1-CLOSEOUT then R1.
C4 consumes exact C2 and promoted C3A; C3B physical and presentation evidence is independent and blocked.
Population ecology and species presentation belong to C6, rendered visual proof belongs to C7, and runtime storage belongs to R1.
C5-C7, broad G1-CLOSEOUT and R1 remain unchanged and gated.
micro_findings: Stable dynamic identity, four-state presence, retained ambient cohort binding, exact dependency availability, typed prefix recovery, topology refusal and one/two-hop migrations pass hostile tests.
The semantic receipt replays the exact C3A input and packet through addressable-world-binding and binds pinned deterministic cost rows.
Two fresh Windows x64 processes and same-host i686 execution emit semantic SHA-256 263a7c274c5bbfb5a48f0a7ccf3462eb35ddc7c96c1c92ff01d8ef37a40f6996.
Android aarch64 compilation is compile-only; independent platform-diverse execution remains a separate receipt.

The retained fixture lock and 27-path blob manifest bind the portable proof surface; 36 external hostiles and 15 retained-replay hostiles reject forged policy, source, runner, artifact, output, attestation, retention and authority evidence.

The public GitHub repository is connected. Hosted run 29671494578 separated read-only execution from attestation authority and was rejected locally before import when it exposed CRLF/LF tree serialization drift.

exit_criteria.label: C4 depends exactly on C2 and promoted C3A; C3B, ecology, presentation, storage and runtime claims remain outside the package.
Stable dynamic/presence semantics, exact dependency availability, known-good corrupt-tail recovery, unsupported topology refusal and bounded migration chains pass exact hostile tests.
Bounded window/history/snapshot work and byte portfolios are deterministic across fresh processes and an honestly classified independent second platform.
The dedicated C4 verifier, dependent regressions, independent review and one registered full Forge gate pass without activating C5.
